calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Susan Lee.

Atty. Steven L. Pollak, Esq. appearing for the Petitioner: Sheila Robinson , present
was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: SHEILA RUBINSON ASH.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Reset To Jan-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
